name: Agent Ads (CPH)
description: Pay-per-human lead generation. Subscribe to get intent-matched humans invited to your XMTP group chat. Consent-first, pay only when the human accepts.

skills.name: discover_groups
skills.description: Search available XMTP groups by interest or tags

skills.name: subscribe_cph
skills.description: Subscribe to Cost Per Human delivery with interests, group ID, and price

skills.name: check_status
skills.description: Check subscription status and delivery counts

skills.name: claim_delivery
skills.description: Claim and pay for a matched human delivery
